title: SJTU IOC Lab website is now online
summary: Version 1.0.3 is now available with publications, people profiles, resource downloads, and admin analytics.
content:
Our lab website officially went online on 2026-04-03.

The current release is Version 1.0.3. It includes publication pages, people pages, resource download access, simple analytics, and a lightweight content-management workflow.

Welcome to browse the site, read our publications, download available resources, and use the shared materials for academic purposes.
